title: FIGS Q4 2023 and Full Year 2023 Financial Results
text: FIGS reported full year 2023 net revenues of $545.6 million, up 7.9% YoY, driven by increase in orders from existing and new customers and AOV increase. Gross margin was 69.1%, down 100 basis points YoY from product mix shift and higher duties, partially offset by lower airfreight utilization and ocean freight rates. Net income was $22.6 million with diluted EPS of $0.12. Q4 2023 revenues were $144.9 million, flat YoY. Gross margin was 67.5%, down 70 basis points from reclassification impact of 100 basis points. Gross margin benefited from lower airfreight utilization, improved ocean freight costs and favorable promotional mix, partially offset by product mix.
